title: Quiz: Controlled Gates
description: Test your understanding of controlled-U and Toffoli gates

questions.question: What does the Toffoli gate do to |110⟩?
questions.explanation: Toffoli flips target when both controls are |1⟩. |110⟩ → |111⟩.

questions.question: The dimension of a Toffoli gate matrix is:
questions.explanation: Toffoli operates on 3 qubits, so it's 2³×2³ = 8×8.

questions.question: The Toffoli gate is universal for classical reversible computation.
questions.explanation: Toffoli can implement any reversible classical function.

questions.question: To build controlled-U, we need:
questions.explanation: CU = |0⟩⟨0|⊗I + |1⟩⟨1|⊗U applies U only when control is |1⟩.
